prestazioni: LS3 6.2L V8 (L99 variant for automatic models) forced induction via Harrop HTV2300 supercharger kit with 10.5psi boost, ported and polished cylinder heads by CNC Motorsports, and a custom Motec M150 ECU tune with flex-fuel ethanol mapping for 650whp on E85

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Harrop heavy-duty 9.5-inch differential with 3.73:1 gearing, upgraded axles from Strange Engineering (S60 series), and a PWR radiator with dual 1000W Davies Craig electric water pumps for LS3 heat management

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (HSV-specific valving), Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear), and polyelastomer bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0115K) for the IRS subframe
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Liberty Walk LB-WORKS HSV GTS kit (carbon fiber fenders, rear diffuser, and front splitter), paired with a set of Work Meister S1 3P 19x10.5 +25 and 19x12 +45 wheels wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35/19 and 315/30/19)

Full HSV GTS-R front bumper lip with integrated DRLs from HSV Performance, carbon fiber bonnet with a custom heat extractor vent (designed for LS3 supercharger clearance), and a rear wing from Seibon Carbon (HSV-specific mount points)

Interior stripped and rebuilt with a full Tillet B10 carbon fiber bucket seat setup (HSV-specific mounting brackets), a custom roll cage by Chassisworks (bolt-in 8.5-point cage with harness bar), and a MoTeC C127 dash display integrated with the Ohlins suspension telemetry
